This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on lifeism.miraheze.org.

Its purpose is to create missing pages and categories, publish git revision history, and perform routine maintenance with transparent logging and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.

Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/order.life

== Operations policy ==

Routine automated edits are implemented by changing the GitHub repository and executed through GitHub Actions. Local manual script runs are reserved for testing and emergency intervention only.

== Current tasks ==

* Create stub pages from [[Special:WantedPages]]
* Create stub categories from [[Special:WantedCategories]]
* Publish [[Git revisions]] table from repository commit history

== Future tasks ==

* Sync Gaiad chapter summaries from build data
* Cross-link calendar day pages with corresponding Gaiad chapters

<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START -->
<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->
